mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO freeboard_report ( reportId, targetId, reporterId, reason, detail, createdAt ) VALUES ( seq_freeboard_report_id.nextval, #{targetId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
SELECT seq_freeboard_report_id.currval FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard_report WHERE targetId = #{targetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard_report WHERE targetId = #{targetId} AND reporterId = #{reporterId}

SELECT f.boardId, f.title, f.userName, f.hidden, COUNT(r.reportId) as reportCount FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN freeboard_report r ON f.boardId = r.targetId GROUP BY f.boardId, f.title, f.userName, f.hidden HAVING COUNT(r.reportId) > 0 ORDER BY reportCount DESC, f.boardId DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO freeboard_comment_report ( reportId, targetId, reporterId, reason, detail, createdAt ) VALUES ( seq_freeboard_creport_id.nextval, #{targetId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
SELECT seq_freeboard_creport_id.currval FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard_comment_report WHERE targetId = #{targetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard_comment_report WHERE targetId = #{targetId} AND reporterId = #{reporterId}

SELECT c.commentId, c.content, c.userName, c.hidden, c.boardId, COUNT(r.reportId) as reportCount FROM freeboard_comment c LEFT JOIN freeboard_comment_report r ON c.commentId = r.targetId GROUP BY c.commentId, c.content, c.userName, c.hidden, c.boardId HAVING COUNT(r.reportId) > 0 ORDER BY reportCount DESC, c.commentId DESC
